headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Nvidia, Carnival, Royal Caribbean, Uber, Elbit, Semtech, and More
summary: Nvidia stock extends gains following the chip maker’s GTC developer event, while shares in cruise-line operators fall.

headline: Royal Caribbean: I See Strength, But I'm No Longer Bullish (Rating Downgrade)
